text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe doesn't show up for training.
Concerned, I go looking for her, only to find her
waving to no one in particular.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Goodbye. Don't get lost on your way home...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... That person got lost, so I was giving
them directions...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get started with training...
choice_data_list: We don't have time for that now...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But I'm sure we only spoke for a few seconds...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...No, that's no excuse. Sorry, I'll be more careful
in the future...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks genuinely sorry. And she did say she'd
be more careful, so I won't press her for more
details...
